import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
with open\(r'D:\\dydaktyka\\2025_2026\\EW\\notebooks\\00_llm_agents_for_coding.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Fix: the literal text in the JSON file has C:\\Users which contains \\U \(invalid JSON escape\)
# Replace the raw bytes
content = content.replace\(r'C:\\Users\\jan\\data\\...', r'C:\\\\Users\\\\jan\\\\data\\\\...'\)

try:
    json.loads\(content\)
    print\("JSON valid after fix"\)
    with open\(r'D:\\dydaktyka\\2025_2026\\EW\\notebooks\\00_llm_agents_for_coding.ipynb', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        f.write\(content\)
    print\("File saved"\)
except json.JSONDecodeError as e:
    print\(f"Still invalid: {e}"\)
    lines = content.split\('\\n'\)
    ln = e.lineno
    for i in range\(max\(0, ln-3\), min\(len\(lines\), ln+3\)\):
        marker = ">>>" if i+1 == ln else "   "
        print\(f"{marker} {i+1}: {lines[i][:200]}"\)
PYEOF)

import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)

# Fix notebook 01
with open\(r'D:\\dydaktyka\\2025_2026\\EW\\notebooks\\01_data_acquisition.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

for cell in nb['cells']:
    src = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
    # Replace CSV paths with parquet
    src = src.replace\("daily_hydro.csv", "daily_hydro.parquet"\)
    # Remove temperature references
    src = src.replace\("from src.data_quality import check_completeness, find_gaps, clean_temperature", 
                       "from src.data_quality import check_completeness, find_gaps"\)
    src = src.replace\("# Wyczyść wartości strażnikowe temperatury\\ndf = clean_temperature\(df\)\\n\\n", ""\)
    src = src.replace\("df = clean_temperature\(df\)\\n", ""\)
    src = src.replace\(", 'water_temp_c'", ""\)
    src = src.replace\("- Wartości strażnikowe temperatury \(99.9 = brak danych\)", ""\)
    src = src.replace\("water_temp_c", ""\)
    # Fix empty lines
    while '\\n\\n\\n' in src:
        src = src.replace\('\\n\\n\\n', '\\n\\n'\)
    cell['source'] = [line + '\\n' for line in src.split\('\\n'\)]
    if cell['source']:
        cell['source'][-1] = cell['source'][-1].rstrip\('\\n'\)

with open\(r'D:\\dydaktyka\\2025_2026\\EW\\notebooks\\01_data_acquisition.ipynb', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(nb, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=1\)
print\("01 fixed"\)

# Fix notebook 02
with open\(r'D:\\dydaktyka\\2025_2026\\EW\\notebooks\\02_data_quality.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

for cell in nb['cells']:
    src = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
    src = src.replace\("daily_hydro.csv", "daily_hydro.parquet"\)
    src = src.replace\("daily_hydro_clean.csv", "daily_hydro_clean.parquet"\)
    src = src.replace\("from src.imgw import load_processed, save_processed\\nfrom src.data_quality import \(\\n    check_completeness,\\n    find_gaps,\\n    fill_gaps_interpolation,\\n    fill_gaps_correlation,\\n    detect_outliers,\\n    clean_temperature,\\n\)",
                       "from src.imgw import load_processed, save_processed\\nfrom src.data_quality import \(\\n    check_completeness,\\n    find_gaps,\\n    fill_gaps_interpolation,\\n    fill_gaps_correlation,\\n    detect_outliers,\\n\)"\)
    src = src.replace\("df = clean_temperature\(df\)\\n", ""\)
    src = src.replace\(", 'water_level_cm'", ""\)
    while '\\n\\n\\n' in src:
        src = src.replace\('\\n\\n\\n', '\\n\\n'\)
    cell['source'] = [line + '\\n' for line in src.split\('\\n'\)]
    if cell['source']:
        cell['source'][-1] = cell['source'][-1].rstrip\('\\n'\)

with open\(r'D:\\dydaktyka\\2025_2026\\EW\\notebooks\\02_data_quality.ipynb', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(nb, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=1\)
print\("02 fixed"\)

# Fix notebook 03
with open\(r'D:\\dydaktyka\\2025_2026\\EW\\notebooks\\03_hydro_statistics.ipynb', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

for cell in nb['cells']:
    src = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
    src = src.replace\("daily_hydro_clean.csv", "daily_hydro_clean.parquet"\)
    cell['source'] = [line + '\\n' for line in src.split\('\\n'\)]
    if cell['source']:
        cell['source'][-1] = cell['source'][-1].rstrip\('\\n'\)

with open\(r'D:\\dydaktyka\\2025_2026\\EW\\notebooks\\03_hydro_statistics.ipynb', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(nb, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=1\)
print\("03 fixed"\)

# Validate all
for name in ['00_llm_agents_for_coding', '01_data_acquisition', '02_data_quality', '03_hydro_statistics']:
    path = fr'D:\\dydaktyka\\2025_2026\\EW\\notebooks\\{name}.ipynb'
    with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        json.load\(f\)
    print\(f"  {name}: valid JSON"\)
PYEOF)
